zh.lifeSummary: Lord Guy De Reinbudcourt於1064年出生在比利時福拉安德倫。他於大約1090年與Mrs Guy De Reinbudcourt結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1099年在英國諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登享年35歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: Lord Guy De Reinbudcourt was born in 1064, in Flanders, Belgium. He married Mrs Guy De Reinbudcourt about 1090. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1099, in Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 35.

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Guy De Reinbudcourt(은)는 1064년 벨기에 블라아더에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1090년 Mrs Guy De Reinbudcourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1099년 영국 노르섬프토실르 치핀그 워든에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.
